notes: The single disagreement entry (tat / yena scope) carries a substantive explanation that names the Advaita reading (Brahman pervading universe), the Vishishtadvaita reading (jīva pervading body), and the translator-level flattening (Prabhupada and Mukundananda preserve ambiguity by saying 'entire body' which is the natural English antecedent).
